problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis may resolve What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
